title: Cybercrime case at Yeshwanthpur PS
narrative: On 2024-12-14, a case of cybercrime was reported at Yeshwanthpur PS, Bengaluru Urban district. Ransomware attack on Rajajinagar business. Systems encrypted, attackers demanded ₹92,000 in cryptocurrency. The investigating team identified 3 suspect(s): Harish Hiremath, Prakash Nayak, Kiran Swamy. The modus operandi observed was: Social engineering via phone calls impersonating bank officials. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 1 prior cases in the Bengaluru Urban area. The case has been resolved and chargesheeted.
modus_operandi: Social engineering via phone calls impersonating bank officials
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Yeshwanthpur PS. 2. 2 witness statements collected. 3. Mobile CDR obtained. 4. Suspect identification parade conducted

modus_operandi: Impersonation of government officials to extract bribes
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Jagalur PS. 2. 2 witness statements collected. 3. Forensic evidence collected. 4. Scene of crime inspected
